creator: dindin@dindin.ru
text:
Wesnoth 1.2.5 has been released. This release mainly features some smaller bug fixes and many translation updates. Some of the other changes can be found in the changelog. (http://svn.gna.org/viewcvs/wesnoth/tags/1.2.5/changelog?rev=18287&view=download)
